name: LinkedIn
signal: Medicare introduces payment codes for AI-augmented care, signaling a new era of AI adoption.
brief: This is a critical regulatory development, as Medicare's creation of payment codes for AI-augmented care validates and incentivizes the use of AI in healthcare. Product managers in health tech should recognize this as a direct market signal and a catalyst for developing and scaling AI-driven healthcare products.
